name: Eggys Big Adventure
author: Poki
description: It’s adventure time for our friend Eggy as he jumps and runs across worlds to gather as many eggs as possible! Maneuver through obstacles big and small to make it to the next door. If you’ve collected enough eggs in the world, you’ll be able to move on to the next! Controls: Left/right arrows - Move left/right Up arrow - Jump E - Enter door About the creator: Eggy Games is also the creator of Eggbot vs Zombies .
